name: mvs-monthly-value-sniper
description: MVS — Monthly Value Sniper v10.9. KuCoin API for Ghana. Three-timeframe (4H bias + 1H structure + 15min trigger, 2-of-3 vote, scanned every 15min), 13 symbols, POC+VAH+VAL+FIBO, zero lagging indicators. Shared core.js logic between live bot and backtester. Public repo, unlimited GitHub Actions minutes.
author: Abdin
